signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual CPI inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's headline CPI inflation increased to 2.16% year-on-year in March 2026, up from 2.00% in February, with month-on-month inflation at 0.34%[2]. This recent data release confirms a modest acceleration amid steady February levels at 2.0% YoY and rising core inflation pressures[1][3]. Upside risks f
